offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent inventory levels cause late orders. We automate inventory replenishment instead of manual inventory tracking and ordering.
problem: Inconsistent inventory levels leading to stockouts and late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 restaurant owners with demo video
Join community forums for restaurant owners
try_it: Let users try Inventory level alerts and Order history tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in a community
